title: Purpura Skies: Map Jade Theme
description: A new theme for Jade! Perfect for cozy and fantasy packs
body:
![Shielded Logo](https://i.imgur.com/eGbOGEt.png)

 

***

We created this Jade theme for an upcoming pack, Shielded, and knew it would perfectly fit in other modpacks!
**Pairs perfectly with our [Xaero's Minimap Frame](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/purpura-skies-xaeros-minimap-frame).**
 

![Entity Preview](https://i.imgur.com/LfZagU1.png)
![Block Preview](https://i.imgur.com/rAHE4VS.png)
